# Table II — PCA-2 Wind-Tunnel, Pitch 0.8°, Protuberances FAIRED

**Source: page_09.png (paper p.9), NACA TR 515 (Wheatley & Hood 1935).**

Tests at four nominal rotor speeds (~98, 119, 138, 148 rpm).
Coefficients are in airplane axes (Wheatley's convention).

**Confidence: PARTIAL.** Of 112 raw rows extracted, 73
passed an L/D = CL/CD consistency check and plausibility ranges on
every cell. The rest had OCR damage in the source PDF text layer
and need manual recovery from `page_09.png`.
